raw_consumer_statement:
BESTBUY Citi Credit Card - XXXX XXXX - have overpaid {$820.00} - was able to get a refund for {$61.00} - but was not able to get refund for {$760.00} - XXXX Contacted BestBuy - received one check for {$61.00} and deposited to XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX - called and send message to BestBuy on XX/XX/XXXX, about the {$760.00} that they should refund however never received refund that they promised - Citi bank promised again to send another check on XX/XX/XXXX check would arrive in 7 business days on XX/XX/XXXX - XXXX Best Buy call - using website : Recent activity show that {$760.00} was refunded on XXXX and then paid somewhere on XXXX, but i have never received a check - on the call they have issues CREDIT BALANCE REFUND XXXX XXXX XXXX {$760.00} - called XXXX - XXXX is helped me, she have reviewed last transaction and confirmed that it was a check that was issued in my name and sent to me. then adjusted amount were put back on the card - XXXX Received check - for {$760.00} - XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX {$760.00} ONLINE DEPOSIT : REF # XXXX {$760.00} Post Date : XX/XX/XXXX Type : DEPOSIT - XXXX XXXX returned money to Citi because of spot payment ( refuse to pay a check ) MISCELLANEOUS DEBIT RL-RETURNED DEPOSIT RETURNED DEPOSITED CHECK # XXXX {$760.00} - STOP PAYMENT - XXXX - contacted best buy again XXXX was helping me- I explained situation - she helped me to get another refund of {$760.00} and would send another check back to me again - expected to receive check in about 7-10 days, so sometime after XX/XX/XXXX - XXXX XX/XX/XXXX - best buy sent me physical mail with a copy of that check saying they closed this issue!!! they stopped payment an I got no refund!!! 

- XXXX XX/XX/XXXX - called XXXX ( XXXX ) and they told me to use my statement to prove that they have bounced that check
